case_title: BRIANNE EASTBURN VS. GAETANI REAL ESTATE, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EASTBURN, BRIANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY PAUL GAETANI--OWNER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
